sections.paragraph:
Original: נזל

Transliteration: nâzal

Phonetic: naw-zal'

BDB Definition:

  1. to flow, distil, flow forth or down, trickle, drop
    1. (Qal)
      1. to flow
        1. streams, floods (participle)
      2. to distil
    2. (Hiphil) to cause to flow

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 1337

Part(s) of speech: Verb
